backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (full-page iframe, branded bar, gallery visual theme) to their source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining light and dark OKLCH CSS custom properties for the shadcn-ui design token system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Revelation Walls Gallery' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the BrandedBar header above a full-viewport iframe embedding the Revelation Walls gallery.
frontend/src/components/BrandedBar.tsx: Fixed header bar displaying the Revelation Walls title, attribution credits (Dominic Williams, Candace Marquette, Dfinity Foundation), a builder link, and a caffeine.ai footer with a decorative background image.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider that manages Internet Identity authentication state, exposing login/logout functions and identity status via an AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the dark art-gallery visual theme with OKLCH gold/amber tokens, Cinzel font, full-viewport layout rules for the gallery shell and iframe, and all branded bar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Cinzel, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens (gold, amber, sidebar, chart), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for the Revelation Walls Gallery app, recording its version, architecture (full-page iframe wrapper for a GitHub Pages gallery), branding details, existing features, and a pending feature request to embed the gallery.
